name: Dump Cake (Black Forest Crisp)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spread cherry pie filling in the bottom of an ungreased 13x9x2 inch pan. Cover evenly with crushed pineapple. Sprinkle with dry cake mix. Cover with pecans. Spread margarine slices evenly over all. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until done. Let cool completely before covering with whipped cream (or Cool Whip) or placing a dollop of whipped cream on each piece when served.
